summary: PDF Export Feature Testing: Backend API fully working (8/8 tests passed). Frontend PDF button implemented in BatimentDetailModalNew.jsx with data-testid='btn-export-pdf'. Unable to verify frontend button via UI testing due to user role restrictions - 'Test Employé' (Lieutenant) cannot access the Batiments page where the building detail modal is displayed.

integration_issues.flow: Building detail modal access from Planification
integration_issues.issue: Clicking on a building in Planification tab redirects to /batiments page, but user 'Test Employé' (Lieutenant) doesn't have access to this page

action_items: Frontend PDF button implementation verified in code (BatimentDetailModalNew.jsx line 1454)
Consider testing with admin user to verify PDF button is visible and functional in UI
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: PDF endpoint at /api/{tenant}/prevention/batiments/{batiment_id}/rapport-pdf works correctly
Backend: PDF includes building info, inspections history, plan intervention, recommendations, and gallery photos section
Frontend: PDF button uses Download icon from lucide-react and calls handleExportPdf function
Frontend: handleExportPdf uses axios with responseType:'blob' for PDF download
